rulings.Case Title: ENRIQUE MORA VS. KASANITA FAAGAU-TALITA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday December 4, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT KASANITA TILITI Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Hearing shall be held at 10:30 a.m. Motion is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Defendant's failure to comply with Court's October 17, 2018 order requiring filing of an answer and filing of a Motion to Quash after having generally appeared in the action, does not constitute "mistake, surprise, or excusable neglect" within the meaning of CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday December 4, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT SANDRA NIEMAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. Hearing shall be held at 10:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)
